name: exodra

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@exodra/core && npm run build --workspace=@exodra/reactivity-types && npm run build --workspace=@exodra/reactivity && npm run build --workspace=@exodra/string && npm run build --workspace=@exodra/dom && npm run build --workspace=@exodra/ssr && npm run build --workspace=@exodra/router && npm run build --workspace=@exodra/jsx && npm run build --workspace=@exodra/forms
scripts.build:tools: npm run build --workspace=@exodra/babel-plugin-jsx && npm run build --workspace=@exodra/vite-plugin && npm run build --workspace=@exodra/profiler && npm run build --workspace=@exodra/react && npm run build --workspace=@exodra/introspect && npm run build --workspace=create-exodra
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:tools
scripts.build:examples: npm run build --workspace=@exodra/examples-client-no-compiler && npm run build --workspace=@exodra/examples-ssr && npm run build --workspace=@exodra/examples-client-with-compiler && npm run build --workspace=@exodra/examples-oimdb-context
scripts.build:clean: npm run clean && npm run build:all
scripts.release:check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:types && npm run build:all && npm run test:run
scripts.release: npm run release:check && npm run test:packed && npm run publish:all
scripts.release:dry: npm run release:check && npm run publish:dry

author: Andrei Baikov
description: A tiny schema-first UI runtime for reactive DOM, SSR, hydration, and JSX
